name: Superheavy Samurai Prepped Defense
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ココロガマ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal or Flip Summoned, if you have any Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard. When you take battle damage, if you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard and this card is in your hand: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal or Flip Summoned, if you have any Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard. When you take battle damage, if you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard and this card is in your hand: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn.
eff: Cannot be Normal or Flip Summoned, if you have any Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard. When you take battle damage, if you have no Spell/Trap Cards in your Graveyard and this card is in your hand: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, it cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects this turn.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
